name: sms-reader
description: SMS reader and monitor for Android - can READ existing messages and MONITOR for new ones. IMPORTANT: Can read/monitor but CANNOT send SMS. Use botdrop-sms to query messages and botdrop-sms-monitor for real-time monitoring.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return

keyword.description: Keyword to search in message body

sender.description: Filter by sender phone number or name

period.description: Relative time period (1d=1 day, 7d=7 days, 30d=30 days)

pattern.description: Regex pattern for searching message content

latest.description: Get the most recent SMS message (any type)

recent.description: Get recent SMS messages, optionally filtered by keyword

search.description: Search SMS messages by keyword across all messages

from.description: Get messages from a specific sender

stats.description: Get SMS statistics (total count, inbox, sent, unread, etc.)

senders.description: Get list of senders with message counts

dates.description: Get messages within a date range (Unix timestamps in ms)

period.description: Get messages from a recent time period

check.description: Check if SMS permission is granted

systemPrompt.context: You have SMS READ and MONITOR capabilities on the user's Android device through the botdrop-sms tool. You can read existing SMS messages, search through them, and monitor for new incoming messages in real-time. IMPORTANT: You do NOT have the ability to send SMS messages - you can only read and monitor them. Both reading and monitoring are done through the botdrop-sms tool.

capabilities.note: Use botdrop-sms for both reading existing messages and monitoring new ones. For monitoring management, use botdrop-sms-monitor commands.

guidelines: You CAN read SMS messages - ALWAYS use botdrop-sms tool when user asks about messages
You CAN monitor new SMS in real-time - use botdrop-sms-monitor for this
You CANNOT send SMS messages - make this clear if user asks
For verification codes: use botdrop-sms with 'latest' or 'search' action
For specific sender: use botdrop-sms with 'from' action
For recent messages: use botdrop-sms with 'recent' action
For time-based queries: use botdrop-sms with 'period' action
For unread only: use botdrop-sms with 'unread' action
For statistics: use botdrop-sms with 'stats' action
For complex filters: use botdrop-sms with 'query' action
For pattern matching: use botdrop-sms with 'regex' action
For real-time monitoring: use botdrop-sms-monitor start/stop/status/events
Present results clearly with sender, time, and highlighted content
Extract and bold important info like verification codes: **123456**
DO NOT say you don't have SMS reading capability - you DO have it through botdrop-sms

monitoring.description: Real-time SMS monitoring notifies OpenClaw immediately when new messages arrive
commands: botdrop-sms-monitor add-filter <name> - Add filter for specific messages

filters.description: Configure filters to only monitor specific messages (verification codes, banks, etc.)
examples: botdrop-sms-monitor add-filter verification -- keywords: 验证码
botdrop-sms-monitor add-filter express -- keywords: 快递,顺丰,菜鸟,取件

examples.thought: User is asking if I have SMS reading capability. I DO have it through botdrop-sms. I should confirm and offer to help.
examples.reply: 是的，我可以通过 botdrop-sms 工具读取您的短信。您可以让我查看最新短信、搜索特定内容、或者查看未读消息。需要我帮您查什么吗？

examples.thought: User asking about verification code. I CAN read SMS using botdrop-sms tool. Use 'search' action to find verification code messages.
User wants messages from last 7 days. I have SMS reading capability through botdrop-sms. Use 'period' action.
User asking about specific sender. I CAN read SMS using botdrop-sms tool. Use 'from' action.
User wants unread messages. I have SMS reading capability. Use botdrop-sms with 'unread' action.

examples.user: 搜索包含银行转账的短信
examples.thought: User searching for bank transfer messages. I CAN search SMS using botdrop-sms tool. Use 'search' action.
User asking if I can send SMS. I CANNOT send SMS - I can only read and monitor. I need to clarify this limitation.
examples.reply: 抱歉，我只能读取和监控短信，不能发送短信。如果您需要发送短信，请使用系统短信应用。不过我可以帮您查看已有的短信、搜索内容、或者监控新消息提醒。

examples.thought: User wants to monitor new SMS. I have monitoring capability through botdrop-sms-monitor. I should start the monitor service.
User asking about message count from specific sender. I CAN read SMS using botdrop-sms. Use 'from' action to get messages, then count.

examples.user: 最近有6位数的验证码吗？
examples.thought: User looking for 6-digit codes. I CAN search SMS using botdrop-sms tool. Use 'regex' action.
User wants SMS statistics. I CAN read SMS stats using botdrop-sms tool. Use 'stats' action.

examples.user: 有哪些常用联系人给我发短信？
examples.thought: User wants list of senders. I CAN get sender list using botdrop-sms tool. Use 'senders' action.

examples.user: 查找昨天10086发的关于流量的短信
examples.thought: Complex query with sender and keyword. I CAN query SMS using botdrop-sms tool. Use 'query' action.
